# dynamodb-toolkit-koa

> Koa adapter for `dynamodb-toolkit` v3. Mounts the toolkit's standard REST route pack as Koa middleware.

**Status:** scaffolding. API below is provisional.

## Install

```sh
npm install dynamodb-toolkit-koa dynamodb-toolkit koa
```

## Quick start

```js
import Koa from 'koa';
import {Adapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit';
import {createKoaAdapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit-koa';

const adapter = new Adapter({client, table: 'planets', keyFields: ['name']});
const app = new Koa();
app.use(createKoaAdapter(adapter));
app.listen(3000);
```

## Links

- Parent toolkit: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit
- Route pack reference: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit/wiki/HTTP-handler
